creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Nickolas,

> Thanks for your suggestion. I am already working on updating those
> ports, you can expect an update soon !

FlightGear-* ports and Simgear have been updated to 2.4.0 ; enjoy !

Thanks for your support,
Best regards,

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
